currency.description: Currency to pay the onboarding fee in

callbackUrl.description: URL Paystack redirects to after fee payment

folder.description: Where the file will be used

info.title: ecommerce-api
info.description: E-Commerce REST API — Node.js, Express, TypeScript, TypeORM, PostgreSQL

400.description: Vendor is not in pending_payment status

get.description: Get the authenticated vendor's profile and status

post.description:
Submit a business document after paying the onboarding fee.
Use POST /uploads/presign first to upload the file to S3,
then pass the returned fileKey here.

get.description: Get all documents submitted by the authenticated vendor
Admin: list all vendors with pending_review status
Admin: view all documents submitted by a specific vendor

post.description: Admin: approve a vendor application
Admin: reject a vendor application with a written reason
Admin: suspend an approved vendor

Step 1 of 2 — Request a pre-signed S3 upload URL.
The client then PUTs the file directly to S3 using this URL.
The file never passes through the API server.

Step 2 of 2 — Confirm the upload completed and get the final URL.
Call this after successfully uploading to S3.
Send a friend request to another user

403.description: Not your request to respond to

put.description: Accept, decline, or block a friend request

get.description: Get all accepted friends
Get all pending friend requests sent to you

post.description: Share your cart with an accepted friend

get.description: View all carts that friends have shared with you
Browse all active approved products with optional search and filters

post.description: Create a new product listing — vendor only

get.description: Get a single product by ID

put.description: Update a product — vendor only, must own the product

delete.description: Soft-delete a product — vendor only, must own the product

get.description: Get all products belonging to the authenticated vendor

post.description:
Paystack webhook — handles all payment events.
No JWT required — Paystack calls this directly.

400.description: Cart is empty or stock issue

post.description:
Checkout — validates cart, creates order, initializes Paystack payment.
Returns the order with a paymentUrl — redirect the customer there to pay.

get.description: Get the authenticated user's order history

Get the authenticated vendor's order history
Retrieves orders that contain products created by the vendor

Get a single order by ID.
Customers can only view their own orders.
Admins can view any order.
Admin: get all orders platform-wide with optional status filter

post.description: Admin: issue a full or partial refund for a paid order

get.description: Get all categories

post.description: Create a new category — admin only

get.description: Get a single category by ID

Get the current user's cart.
Creates an empty cart automatically if none exists.

delete.description: Remove all items from the cart

post.description:
Add a product to the cart.
If the product is already in the cart the quantities are merged.
The price is snapshotted at the time of adding.

put.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item

delete.description: Remove a specific item from the cart

post.description: Register a new customer account
Log in with email and password
Get a new access token using a refresh token
Log out a user by invalidating their refresh token

get.description: Get all users with optional role and search filters — admin only

post.description: Suspend or reactivate a user account — admin only

get.description: Get all orders platform-wide — admin only
Get low stock alerts — products at or below the threshold — admin only
Get platform analytics — admin only
Get products pending review — admin only

post.description: Approve, reject, or flag a product listing — admin only
